failures.description: No failure is evident in the provided trajectory. The agent performed the correct tool call and produced the correct filtered answer from the tool output.
failures.checklist_reasoning: No checklist category clearly applies because the trajectory follows the required plan: it searches the catalog with available_only=true, backlight=RGB, product_type=Mechanical Keyboard, receives five matching items, then filters for price strictly greater than 233.90. The returned answer includes only item_id 1151293680 at 272.33 and item_id 2299424241 at 237.48; it correctly excludes 4402162122 at exactly 233.90 because the user asked for more than $233.90.
